assessments.rationale: Fabs operate their own HV/MV substation sized for tens-to-hundreds of MW. BESS interconnect is internal, not DSO-side. Study work is standard but non-trivial.
assessments.mitigation: Tie BESS into fab internal MV bus (not DSO feeder), Perform load-flow and short-circuit coordination study with fab facility engineering, Agree breaker / protection settings with existing fab HV/MV substation operator

assessments.rationale: Fab parcels >50 ha (Infineon Dresden, ESMC Dresden). Footprint is negligible vs. fab size; binding dimension is fire clearance, not area.
assessments.mitigation: Site BESS container in fab utility-yard / power-block perimeter, Run FM Global / VdS separation-distance study, Coordinate with Baugenehmigung for greenfield or Nachtrag for brownfield

assessments.rationale: Fab insurance regime is stricter than generic VdS guidance; BESS location selection and suppression specification must survive owner's fire insurer review. Standard work inside fab facility engineering scope.
assessments.mitigation: Apply FM Global DS 5-33 / SEMI S2-equivalent separation-distance analysis, Potentially increase container separation or add physical firewall for cluster >3 MWh, Pass fab-owner fire insurer (FM Global / HDI / Munich Re) review

assessments.rationale: is_absolute flag is at chemistry level, not market level. Fab industry is risk-averse but has mature processes for classifying and siting energy-dense assets (dielectric gas, H2, solvent storage). BESS fits that methodology.
assessments.mitigation: Fab-grade hazard / failure-mode review (FMEA + HAZOP), Deflagration-vented compartmentation + gas-detect interlocks with fab DCS, Remote siting option (container outside fab perimeter with MV cable link) where fire engineer requires it

assessments.rationale: Fab build cycles are 24-36 months. 6-12 month FGW TR8 certification runs entirely inside that window and is not on fab's critical path.
EU Chips Act and sovereignty optics may push fab owners toward non-CN cell content. Premium is 5-15%. Also potentially a positive differentiator rather than a penalty.
assessments.mitigation: Offer EU/KR-cell BESS variant (LG ES, Samsung SDI, Northvolt) at cost premium, Dual-source cell supply to hedge tariff / CRMA exposure, Prepare EU Battery Regulation / Digital Product Passport compliance documentation

assessments.rationale: German fab locations (Dresden, Reutlingen, Magdeburg, Villach) fall within -20 to +50 C. Container HVAC buffer handles extremes.

Fab use-case is ride-through + power quality, where roundtrip efficiency is immaterial (millisecond dispatch). For PV+BESS self-consumption layer, 10-15% loss is standard cost of flex. No zero-output condition.

Cost is never a knockout. Fab buyers do not evaluate BESS on €/kWh vs. arbitrage payback; they evaluate on availability insurance. Sales motion pivot (marketing + proposal engineering) is the work item, not hardware.
assessments.mitigation: Reframe business case from arbitrage-payback to availability-insurance (one saved batch = €M-€10M+), Stack Netzentgelte peak-shaving + decarbonization + ancillary-services revenue on top of ride-through primary, Position PV+BESS bundle vs. standalone to leverage Mein Solar PV-EPC cost base
